description: The ``TimeSpan Total Hours`` node takes in a TimeSpan and returns with the amount of hours in that TimeSpan, including the fractional portion of a hour, as well as anything longer than an hour will be added into the total.

fields.TimeSpan: The TimeSpan we are getting info from.
fields.* ([[Type:double|double]]): Returns the amount of hours in this TimeSpan as an double.
